description: Non-Geniza. Letter from Yiṣḥaq b. Shelomo (1755–1826) to the ḥakhams Shemuel Kohen and Yosef Shelomo, in Yevpatoria (גוזלווא). Dated: 1820 CE. Contains an intricate legal query. Also an order for the book Shviley Emuna, "because I need it very much sometimes for the healing of the sick." Information in part from NLI.
